preview.summary: Two-time champions Uruguay meet World Cup debutants Cape Verde in a Group H clash with knockout implications. Bielsa's experienced, possession-minded side are heavy favorites against the Blue Sharks, who arrive with nothing to lose. Cape Verde's pace and energy on the break could trouble Uruguay if the favorites are loose.
preview.homeForm: Uruguay are ranked around 17th and are favored to advance from Group H alongside Spain.
preview.awayForm: Cape Verde, ranked near 69th, reached their first-ever World Cup by topping a group above Cameroon.
preview.homeKey: Federico Valverde, Real Madrid midfielder controlling tempo from deep.
preview.awayKey: Dailon Livramento, qualifying's top scorer and main attacking reference.
storylines: Cape Verde's historic World Cup debut on the Miami stage
Bielsa's Uruguay aim to seal qualification early
Blue Sharks chase a fairytale upset against a giant
preview.h2h: The two nations have no prior meetings at any level.
